denying the value of the human endeavour behind a work of art isn't just a matter of preference. It is an implicit denial of  our capacity to endow existence with meaning through our actions. It is a species of nihilism whose end game is despair. So yes, they are wrong.

value.text: But what about those who don't care about those things? Sure, the creator cares, and plenty of others do; but there are people who don't care about the blood, sweat, and tears that went into some artwork. Are they wrong?

Even if slop and artistic creation are one day indistinguishable, the end product is only part of their value. Two identical works are not of equal value if one was hard-won through years of blood, sweat, and tears, and the other spat out by a quick flicker of transistors.

National Chocolate Ice Cream Day

images.alt:
Chocolate ice cream is a popular flavor of ice cream that is made with cocoa powder or chocolate. It is typically a rich, creamy, and indulgent dessert that is enjoyed by many people around the world.
Chocolate ice cream can be made in a variety of ways, but most recipes involve mixing cocoa powder or melted chocolate with milk, cream, sugar, and other ingredients such as vanilla extract or eggs.
The mixture is then churned in an ice cream maker until it reaches a smooth and creamy consistency. Some recipes may also call for the addition of chopped chocolate, chocolate chips, or other mix-ins to add texture and flavor.
Chocolate ice cream can be enjoyed on its own or as a topping for other desserts such as pies, cakes, or brownies. It is also a popular flavor for milkshakes and other frozen treats. Some people like to experiment with different variations of chocolate ice cream, such as adding spices like cinnamon or chili powder, or using different types of chocolate such as dark chocolate or white chocolate.

images.alt:
A weathered stone shrine stands deep within a misty forest, nearly consumed by the massive roots of an ancient tree growing directly through and over its structure. Thick moss drapes from the roofline like green curtains, while twisted roots wrap around carved stone ornaments and pillars. A sacred rope with hanging paper streamers stretches across the entrance, hinting at its spiritual significance despite centuries of neglect. The forest floor is damp and dark, with a winding path of worn stepping stones leading toward the shrine. Soft morning light filters through dense branches overhead, creating glowing patches of white and pale green among drifting mist. Fine particles float in the air, enhancing the dreamlike atmosphere. The entire scene feels ancient, hidden, and untouched, as though nature has slowly reclaimed a sacred place and guarded it from the outside world.
Keywords:

images.alt:
An ethereal mermaid rests beneath the ocean within the remains of an ancient stone archway encrusted with coral, pearls, and marine growth. Her silver-blue tail curves gracefully across the lower half of the scene, its scales catching shafts of filtered light descending from above. Pale flowing fabric and delicate coral blossoms surround her like an underwater gown, blending seamlessly with the reef that has claimed the ruins. Her eyes are closed, and her expression is peaceful, as if suspended between sleep and dream. Long hair drifts weightlessly through the water, intertwined with pink and white coral formations that resemble a living crown. Tiny fish weave through the strands, while clouds of floating particles sparkle in the surrounding water. The stone columns framing the scene are heavily weathered and covered in soft marine life, suggesting a forgotten underwater sanctuary. Cool blue-green tones dominate the composition, contrasted by blush pink coral blooms that create warmth and elegance. The overall atmosphere is tranquil, magical, and timeless, evoking the feeling of discovering a hidden kingdom beneath the sea.
Keywords:
mermaid, underwater, coral reef, ocean, fantasy, ruins, marine life, pearls, ethereal, aquatic, dreamlike, sanctuary

images.alt:
A haunting surrealist painting unfolds against a misty gray-green background that fades into darkness at the edges. In the lower left corner, a ghostly female figure emerges from a mass of black, smoky brushstrokes. Her pale face and bare shoulder are softly illuminated, while much of her form dissolves into shadow as though she is becoming part of the darkness itself. Around her rise several long, delicate flower stems that curve and bend through the composition. Their blossoms are deep crimson, resembling roses or thistles, with ragged petals and ink-like drips. Two of the flowers have burst into glowing white blooms that radiate soft light, creating luminous focal points against the muted backdrop. Wisps of black paint and fine scratch-like marks trail from the stems and flowers, giving the image a sense of movement and fragility. The overall atmosphere feels melancholic and dreamlike, blending organic forms with spectral human presence. The contrast between the pale figure, glowing blossoms, and encroaching darkness creates a quiet tension between beauty, decay, memory, and transformation.
Keywords:
dark fantasy, surreal portrait, spectral woman, crimson flowers, glowing bloom, gothic art, dreamscape, painterly texture, shadow figure, ethereal, moody atmosphere, fine art

images.alt:
Page 1: A penguin wearing a flowered straw hat and holding a new age style talking stick (decorated in flowers, feathers, and a herring) is standing in a  park like area in front of a banner reading "Cosmic Herrings Commune."

Straw hat penguin: You birds have been a bit rowdy lately! So we're instituting a talking stick, in order to politely share our thoughts and grievances.

Offscreen penguin: May I ask a question?

Straw hat penguin: Do you have the stick?

Offscreen penguin: Not yet, no.

Straw hat penguin:  Then no.

Narrator: Sometimes there are logistics problems...

Page 2: A penguin dressed as a wizard against a starry blue  night sky. The penguin holds a wand shooting off glowing sparkles. Hanging in thin air is a glowing sign reading "Society of Cosplay Wizards."

Wizard penguin: This is the "talking wand", and if you're not holding it, you will keep your beak shut.

Offscreen penguin: If I don't obey the rules, are you going to turn me into a newt?

Wizard penguin: Well I don't normally do upgrades...but in your case...

Narrator: ...and some groups will eventually come around, especially under threat of newting.

Page 3: An old fashioned college classroom, with a note on the chalkboard  "Medieval Combat Argument Guild",  and "Tuesdays 7:30pm" underneath in smaller letters. A penguin wearing a knight's helmet is holding a morningstar-type weapon with a spiked steel ball.

Knight hat penguin: We're retiring the "Stick of Civil Discourse" and are hereby replacing it with the "Staff of Shutteth-ing Up"

Offscreen penguin: Well I have a "Talking Trebuchet" that begs to differ!

Narrator: Some groups end up inevitably escalating...

Page 4: A rustic woodshop with a wooden sign that reads "Wednesday Wood Wasters", where a penguin, holding a skew chisel and wearing a hat decorated with wood shavings, stands in front of a "Herring Co" brand wood lathe.

Penguin with skew: This is the "talking skew chisel" with which we will bring our free for all meetings under control!

Offscreen penguin 1: Why not a "talking bowl gouge"...?

Offscreen penguin 2: When's the last time you sharpened that thing?

Offscreen penguin 3: It could stand a new handle!

Offscreen penguin 4: I just picked up a piece of ash that would be perfect!

Narrator: ...and sometimes the idea just makes a nice little sound as it goes zipping by.
